overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking through a snowy, foggy mountain forest at night. The player crosses a stone bridge with lit lanterns and proceeds along a winding trail through rocky terrain and pine trees, briefly encountering a lone pedestrian before continuing toward a bright opening in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a stone bridge with two lit lanterns, snow covering the walls and ground. The camera walks forward across the bridge, exiting onto a snowy forest path as the bridge recedes behind.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a snowy trail flanked by rock outcrops and pine trees. A lone figure in dark clothing appears ahead on the path, walking in the same direction before being passed.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding trail through rocky canyon with snow

segments.scene_description: The trail narrows between tall rock walls on the left and scattered boulders on the right. The path winds through the snowy canyon with sparse trees visible through the fog.

segments.scene_description: The forest opens up with more widely spaced pine trees. A bright light source becomes visible ahead through the fog, illuminating the snowy path with blue moonlight.

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the narrow rocky corridor toward the bright opening

tall stone walls forming a narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The path narrows between high rock walls on both sides, creating a corridor leading toward a bright luminous opening ahead. The snow continues to cover the ground as the camera approaches the light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a lantern-lit bridge through a narrowing snowy canyon toward a distant, luminous opening. It begins by crossing a stone bridge flanked by glowing lanterns, moving forward as the structure recedes to reveal a snowy forest path. As the camera advances along the trail past rock outcrops and pine trees, it passes a lone figure in dark clothing before the path winds into a tighter canyon of tall rock walls and sparse foliage. The scene then opens into a wider stretch of forest where blue moonlight begins to pierce through the fog, illuminating the snow. Finally, the terrain constricts once more into a high-walled rocky corridor that leads the camera directly toward a bright, glowing light ahead.
